name_en: 【Top Grade Hardware, Original Leather】IVY Calfskin and Sheepskin Patchwork Tote/Shoulder Bag~Patchwork Brown Full Leather
name_cn:
【Top Grade Hardware, Original Leather】IVY Calfskin and Sheepskin Patchwork Tote/Shoulder Bag~Patchwork Brown Full Leather
This IVY bag presents a slight vintage style while highlighting its unique design features through patchwork. The letter logo showcases the brand's classic identity.
~With handle
~Gold-plated hardware
~Front letter logo
~Lined with double-chain zip pocket
Size: W28×H28×D12cm
No.: 5BG286
